variants: Clementine Gayraud currently resides in Diamond Hummock, although she was born in Floral Reach. She is widely recognized for her invention known as the Violet Signal Transposer, an innovative device contributing significantly to technology. Her outstanding work earned her the prestigious Lightward Sapphire Ribbon, honoring her creativity and impact. In addition to her professional endeavors, Clementine is a passionate member of the Cobblestone Falconers Group, engaging with fellow bird enthusiasts and fostering a sense of community centered around the appreciation of avian life.
